apod_title: M82: Galaxy with a Supergalactic Wind
label: namecode - GALAXY | 000 ly
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by M82: Galaxy with a Supergalactic Wind. Why is the Cigar Galaxy billowing red smoke?  M82, as this starburst galaxy is also known, was stirred up by a recent pass near large spiral galaxy M81.
